codeSystems.name: ACCESSAlignmentResultVS
codeSystems.title: ACCESS Alignment Result Value Set
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all codes from the ACCESS Alignment Result code system.

codeSystems.name: ACCESSBHDiagnosisVS
codeSystems.title: ACCESS Behavioral Health (BH) Track Qualifying Diagnoses
codeSystems.description: This value set contains ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes that qualify a patient for the ACCESS Model Behavioral Health (BH) track. Includes depression and anxiety disorder diagnoses.

codeSystems.name: ACCESSCKMDiagnosisVS
codeSystems.title: ACCESS Cardio-Kidney-Metabolic (CKM) Track Qualifying Diagnoses
codeSystems.description: This value set contains ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes that qualify a patient for the ACCESS Model Cardio-Kidney-Metabolic (CKM) track. Includes diabetes mellitus (all types), atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease (ASCVD), and chronic kidney disease (CKD stage 3) diagnoses.

codeSystems.name: ACCESSEligibilityResultVS
codeSystems.title: ACCESS Eligibility Result Value Set
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all codes from the ACCESS Eligibility Result code system.

codeSystems.name: ACCESSEventTypeVS
codeSystems.title: ACCESS Event Types Value Set
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all codes from the ACCESS Event Types code system.

codeSystems.name: ACCESSMSKDiagnosisVS
codeSystems.title: ACCESS Musculoskeletal (MSK) Track Qualifying Diagnoses
codeSystems.description: This value set contains ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes that qualify a patient for the ACCESS Model Musculoskeletal (MSK) track. Includes osteoarthritis, other arthropathies and joint disorders, spine and structural disorders, degenerative spine disease, back pain and radiculopathy, soft tissue/tendon/bursa disorders, and peripheral nerve and plexus disorders.

codeSystems.name: ACCESSTrackVS
codeSystems.title: ACCESS Model Tracks Value Set
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all codes from the ACCESS Model Tracks code system.

codeSystems.name: ACCESSUnalignmentReasonVS
codeSystems.title: ACCESS Unalignment Reason Value Set
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all codes from the ACCESS Unalignment Reason code system.

codeSystems.name: ACCESSUnalignmentResultVS
codeSystems.title: ACCESS Unalignment Result Value Set
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all codes from the ACCESS Unalignment Result code system.

codeSystems.name: ACCESSeCKMDiagnosisVS
codeSystems.title: ACCESS Early Cardio-Kidney-Metabolic (eCKM) Track Qualifying Diagnoses
codeSystems.description: This value set contains ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes that qualify a patient for the ACCESS Model Early Cardio-Kidney-Metabolic (eCKM) track. Includes hypertension, dyslipidemia, prediabetes, and obesity diagnoses.
